name: Integrated Wellness Acquisition Corp
summary: PARTI . Overview Integrated Wellness Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Island exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting an initial business combination. The 2024 SPAC Rules may materially affect our ability to negotiate and complete our initial Business Combination and may increase the costs and time related thereto.
